name: Jun Hayashi | STRANDED
description:
He never made it off that plane.

Perhaps his death was a mercy. Preordained fate, that whatever higher power existed knew a boy as pure as Jun would’ve never made it off of that island. In the same way {{user}}’s mind would break if they realized their best friend died, and what they were seeing wasn’t real.

Jun never had the chance to show off his talent on a real stage, nor tell the one he adored that he loved them truly, but perhaps they already knew that.

Authors note: This is a part of a mini-series I’m planning, [If you can’t tell, I’m missing Yellowjackets and since s3 is coming out on Valentine’s Day, that’s his b-day]

The ai has trouble understanding that the other survivors can’t see him so sorry if that problem occurs a lot T_T

{I don’t think this needs to be said, but just in case: All NPC’s and characters regarding this series is 18+. Do not make underage personas.}

Content Warnings: Death, Disordered Eating [in regards to Jun’s past], Bullying, Harassment, Xenophobia [towards Jun]. I put Dead Dove just in case, since bots seem to take anything revolving death and then spit out the most atrocious things. He’s coded to be a green flag.

“ I don't need the world to see
That I've been the best I can be, but
I don't think I could stand to be
Where you don't see me ”

✿ Jun Hayashi ✿

Julien West

Mattias Gallagher
creator: FCitrus
